ab: pstna ta cuxan ’lyan ga?
ch: W:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
en: Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

ab: aw, pstna ta beh inu?
ch: M:可以，我們約哪裡見面?
en: Sure, where should we meet?

ab: pstna ta beh pwasan biru ga? mosa ta pgalan lutux c’oli.
ch: W:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
en: How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

ab: hata beh pslyan kya, plukus caku lukus Tayal mosa.
ch: M:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
en: Then let’s go to the community center. I’ll wear folk costume.

ab: myasa ci texan sakura alang myan, gmyah phpah nya lga uwah la ki.
ch: W: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你再來吧!
en: The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

ab: n’gon beta tmangaw abaw lga , msu’i ci la.
ch: M: 那要等到春天，太遲了吧!
en: That would have to wait until spring. It’s too late, isn’t it?

ab: uwah s’esan ryax na kmloh la.
ch: W: 那你豐年祭的時候來吧!
en: Then come during our Harvest Festival!

ab: aw la, m’es caku ci mnaga uwah ryax haca.
ch: M: 好啊!我很期待那天的到來!
en: Alright! I’m looking forward to it!

ab: ca su mosa maki alang rgyah loyi?
ch: W: 你為甚麼又要回到部落生活?
en: May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

ab: mosa caku psba biru kya.
ch: M: 我要回去教書。
en: I want to return to teach at the local school.

ab: ca su ini psba biru beh alang b’nux?
ch: W: 為甚麼不在都市教書?
en: Why not teach in the city?

ab: baha mcwa llungun mu ci alang maku rgyax, aki kyan lalu ccyuk maku mtiyaw yaw alang.
ch: M: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，我也希望能回饋部落。
en: Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

ab: kba’an su ci tminun gey, ima psba isu?
ch: M:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
en: You’re very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

ab: sba’an caku nya uya mu, maki alang myan rgyax ga heya kba ci tminun.
ch: W:是我的奶奶教我的，她是我們部落最會織布的。
en: It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

ab: ca su nglung tkba tminun?
ch: M:你怎麼會想要學織布?
en: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

ab: tminun hani ga gaga myan, nglung caku mubuy yaw na gaga.
ch: W:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
en: Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

ab: uwaw trakis hani ga ble ci nbun.
ch: M:這個小米酒真好喝。
en: This millet wine is delicious.

ab: kinang nanak wa p’uwaw kwani.
ch: W:是我自己釀的喔!
en: I made it myself!

ab: kba su ci gey, bsya tyawun p’uwaw hani?
ch: M:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
en: You’re really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

ab: ini, utux hngawan lga masu la. lman sklwan trakis ru pagay hkay ha, s’un magun tamun lga, ana kupun beh cahuy slaman la.
ch: W:不用，大約一周就好了。把糯米和白米先蒸熟，再加入麴粉一起拌勻，就可以裝到甕裡了。
en: No, it only takes about a week. After steaming the sticky rice and white rice, we mix it with yeast powder, and then it can be stored in a jar.
